title: BEM-548.3 provider probe integration

workflows = Path('.github/workflows')
workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')

contract = protocols/'PROVIDER_ADAPTER_PROBE_INTEGRATION.md'
contract.write_text('# BEM-548.3 | Provider Adapter Probe Integration\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:55 (UTC+3)\n\n## Rule\nProvider adapter must write `provider_probe_result`, `provider_selection_decision`, and `provider_selection_audit` for every provider decision.\n\n## Decision matrix\n| Claude signal | Selected provider | Reserve |\n|---|---|---|\n| active/completed | claude | false |\n| failed/cancelled/timeout/missing_result_after_ttl | gpt | true |\n| unknown/no_signal | claude | false |\n\n## No silent switch\nGPT reserve may be selected only after explicit failed/cancelled/timeout/missing_result_after_ttl evidence.\n')

wf = workflows/'provider-adapter.yml'
wf_lines = [
'name: Provider Adapter',
'',
'on:',
'  workflow_dispatch:',
'    inputs:',
'      cycle_id:',
'        description: Internal role cycle id',
'        required: true',
'        type: string',
'      provider:',
'        description: Primary provider',
'        required: true',
'        default: claude',
'        type: string',
'      role:',
'        description: Role requesting provider',
'        required: true',
'        type: string',
'      status:',
'        description: completed, failed, cancelled, timeout, missing_result_after_ttl, unknown',
'        required: true',
'        default: unknown',
'        type: string',
'',
'permissions:',
'  contents: write',
'',
'jobs:',
'  adapt:',
'    runs-on: ubuntu-latest',
'    steps:',
'      - uses: actions/checkout@v4',
'      - name: Probe and select provider',
'        shell: bash',
'        run: |',
'          python3 - <<PY',
'          import json',
'          from pathlib import Path',
'          cycle_id = "${{ inputs.cycle_id }}"',
'          provider = "${{ inputs.provider }}"',
'          role = "${{ inputs.role }}"',
'          signal = "${{ inputs.status }}"',
'          transport = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'          state_path = Path("governance/state/provider_contour_state.json")',
'          if signal in ["completed", "active"]:',
'              selected = provider',
'              reserve_used = False',
'              reason = "primary_provider_available"',
'          elif signal in ["failed", "cancelled", "timeout", "missing_result_after_ttl"]:',
'              selected = "gpt" if provider == "claude" else provider',
'              reserve_used = provider == "claude"',
'              reason = provider + "_" + signal',
'          else:',
'              selected = provider',
'              reserve_used = False',
'              reason = "no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve"',
'          probe = {"record_type":"provider_probe_result","cycle_id":cycle_id,"source":"provider-adapter.yml","provider":provider,"role":role,"probe_signal":signal,"status":"completed","artifact_path":"governance/transport/results.jsonl","commit_sha":None,"blocker":None,"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'          decision = {"record_type":"provider_selection_decision","cycle_id":cycle_id,"source":"provider-adapter.yml","from_role":"provider_adapter","to_role":role,"primary_provider":provider,"reserve_provider":"gpt","probe_signal":signal,"selected_provider":selected,"reserve_used":reserve_used,"decision":"select_" + selected,"reason":reason,"status":"completed","artifact_path":"governance/transport/results.jsonl","commit_sha":None,"blocker":None,"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'          audit = {"record_type":"provider_selection_audit","cycle_id":cycle_id,"source":"provider-adapter.yml","from_role":"auditor","to_role":"curator","status":"completed","decision":"PROVIDER_SELECTION_AUDITED","selected_provider":selected,"reserve_used":reserve_used,"reason":reason,"artifact_path":"governance/transport/results.jsonl","commit_sha":None,"blocker":None,"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'          transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'          with transport.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:',
'              f.write(json.dumps(probe, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")',
'              f.write(json.dumps(decision, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")',
'              f.write(json.dumps(audit, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")',
'          state = {}',
'          if state_path.exists():',
'              try:',
'                  state = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'              except Exception:',
'                  state = {}',
'          state["last_provider_probe"] = probe',
'          state["last_provider_selection"] = decision',
'          state["last_provider_selection_audit"] = audit',
'          state["selected_provider"] = selected',
'          state["reserve_used"] = reserve_used',
'          state["last_switch_reason"] = reason if reserve_used else None',
'          state["blocker"] = None',
'          state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")',
'          PY',
'      - name: Commit provider decision',
'        shell: bash',
'        run: |',
'          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"',
'          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"',
'          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/provider_contour_state.json',
'          git commit -m "Provider adapter probe decision ${{ inputs.cycle_id }}" || echo "No changes"',
'          git push',
]
wf.write_text('\n'.join(wf_lines) + '\n')

text = wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks = {
  'workflow_exists': wf.exists(),
  'workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch' in text,
  'no_schedule': 'schedule:' not in text,
  'writes_probe': 'provider_probe_result' in text,
  'writes_decision': 'provider_selection_decision' in text,
  'writes_audit': 'provider_selection_audit' in text,
  'unknown_selects_primary': 'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve' in text,
  'failure_selects_gpt': 'missing_result_after_ttl' in text and 'reserve_used' in text,
  'writes_transport': 'governance/transport/results.jsonl' in text,
  'writes_state': 'provider_contour_state.json' in text,
  'no_issue_31': '#31' not in text and 'issue_number: 31' not in text
}
ok = all(checks.values())
record = {'record_type':'provider_adapter_probe_integration_audit','cycle_id':'bem548-3-provider-probe-integration','source':'gpt','status':'completed' if ok else 'failed','checks':checks,'artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem548_3_provider_probe_integration.md','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None if ok else {'code':'PROVIDER_PROBE_INTEGRATION_FAILED','checks':checks},'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:55 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:55 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['provider_adapter_probe_integration'] = {'status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','workflow':'.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','checks':checks}
provider_state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'PROVIDER_PROBE_INTEGRATION_FAILED'}
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem548_3_provider_probe_integration.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.3 | Provider Probe Integration | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:55 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- `.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml` aligned with BEM-541 provider probe before reserve.\n- Workflow now writes probe, selection, and audit records.\n- Unknown/no failure evidence keeps primary provider; failed/cancelled/timeout can use reserve.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'PROVIDER_PROBE_INTEGRATION_FAILED') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem548_3_provider_probe_integration.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-548.3 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': provider probe integration completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(contract), str(wf), str(transport), str(provider_state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-548.3 provider probe integration completed')
"""
